intro: Cadetia pseudoaprina, commonly known as Cadetia or Purple Cadetia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Cadetia pseudoaprina include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Cadetia pseudoaprina include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
